steps.title: Spot the contrast signal
steps.content: The phrase “on the other hand” marks where the sentence shifts from defining vertical gene transfer to defining horizontal gene transfer. This contrast structure is how the sentence functions—one process is explained through its distinction from the other.

steps.title: Match the function to the choices
steps.content: B correctly identifies the function: the sentence explains one biological process (horizontal gene transfer) by contrasting it with a similar but distinct process (vertical gene transfer). The other three fail to recognize this contrastive purpose—A proposes future research, C argues they're more similar than shown, and D misattributes later analytical work. This matches choice B — B is correct.
